19.reason: [The loop condition 'i<=p' causes the loop to run only once, but it should shift elements from p to q-1 to restore the original array. It should be 'i<q' instead of 'i<=p'.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The loop condition 'i<=p' causes the loop to run only once, but it should shift elements from p to q-1 to restore the original array. It should be 'i<q' instead of 'i<=p'.]
